prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-CHPTK-BUN-34PC-STD-BLCK-TT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Complete Pottery Tools Set Sculpting Clay Art Supplies with Tool Box, 28pc Description: The 28pc Complete Pottery Tools Set from ToolTreaux includes a variety of tools suitable for pottery making, as well as molding or sculpting clay and other soft materials.

Inside of the tool box you'll find a 19pc pottery pick set, which is an essential collection of basic tools you'll need while creating pottery. Included are all of the tools needed for slicing clay, removing clay from your wheel, modeling tools, detail and piercing tools, as well as shaving tools. In addition, we've included a 4pc stainless steel pick and hook pottery wax carving set. These tools will help you define details and feature knurled handles for a better grip. All of these tools fit nicely inside of a canvas travel pouch.

Inside the box you'll also find a microfiber cleaning cloth to assist during clean up. It will work on any surface and can be used without the use of chemicals to protect your artwork as well as your workspace. This cloth is non abrasive reusable many times over. Lastly, we've also included a snifter bottle with an easy to use nozzle. This will come in handy if you need to clean very small or intricate parts of your artwork, or just need a drizzle of water.

PACKAGE INCLUDES:

(1) Loop Tool (for trimming & shaving large amounts of clay)
(1) Potter's Rib (double-ended for cutting/shaving clay)
(1) Ribbon Tool (double-ended for cutting/shaving clay)
(1) Cut Off Needle (for adding fine details & piercing)
(1) Wood Modeling Tool (for sculpting/adding detail)
(1) Sponge (to clean & smooth)
(1) Aluminum Scraper (for smoothing & shaping)
(1) Wire Clay Cutter (for slicing clay or removing pottery from wheel)
(11) Double-sided Pottery Tools
(1) Microfiber Cleaning Cloth
(1) Tool Box
(4) Stainless Steel Carving Tools
(1) Snifter Bottle
(1) Canvas Zip Pouch Search Terms: pottery artisan art supplies painting arts and crafts hobby tools studio creative design homemade clay mud resin putty sculpting Features: - 28PC POTTERY TOOLS SET: For pottery making or molding other soft materials like mud or clay, all the tools included in this 28pc set from ToolTreaux will give you plenty of creative options when reaching for smoothing, shaping, detailing, trimming and much more - TOOL BOX FOR STORAGE: Keep all the items of this pottery tools kit organized and together with the included tool box that snaps shut to keep everything secure when not in use; the kit also includes a black canvas zip pouch for more organization of tools inside the tool box - MICROFIBER CLEANING CLOTH: Highly absorbent and reusable many times over, this pottery tools kit includes a handy microfiber cleaning cloth so dry off hands and wipe down tools; easy to keep clean, just toss it in the wash with other like colors - KIT INCLUDES: Loop Tool, Potter's Rib, Ribbon Tool, Cut Off Needle, Wood Modeling Tool, Sponge, Aluminum Scraper, Wire Clay Cutter, x11 Double sided Pottery Tools, Microfiber Cleaning Cloth, Tool Box, Stainless Steel Carving Tools, Snifter Bottle and Canvas Zip Pouch - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 11 x 5 x 5 inches; Weight: 1.6lbs; Color: Assorted === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
